listitem.para: Input grayscale or RGB image. RGB input is converted to grayscale.
Optional positive threshold. When greater than zero, the output is a boolean ridge mask. Default is 0.
Ridge response image or boolean ridge mask.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Computes the smaller-magnitude Hessian eigenvalue as a ridge response. An optional threshold returns a binary ridge mask.

refsection.title: Examples
